ghr v0.8.1 is a small follow-up release that makes PR and issue conversations match GitHub's timeline model more closely.

Highlights:

- Quote reply now works for pull request review summary comments, matching GitHub's web UI behavior.
- PR and issue descriptions can be quote-replied as regular conversation comments.
- Push activity now renders as a separate Activity timeline before Comments and no longer behaves like a selectable comment.
- Updated README release docs and pinned install examples for v0.8.1.

Install:

```bash
curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chenyukang/ghr/main/install.sh | sh
```

Windows PowerShell:

```powershell
irm https://raw.githubusercontent.com/chenyukang/ghr/main/install.ps1 | iex
```

Cargo:

```bash
cargo install ghr-cli
```
